title: VLCC Freight Pulse & Russia Flows
summary:
Main
Tracking VLCC freight momentum and the latest Russian flow shifts Week 48 | November 27, 2025
TD3C and TD15 stay at multi-year seasonal highs as the rally continues to push on
AG/WAFR net supply remains tight, with early signs of a renewed upward push
Nov 21-sanctioned Russian flows remain a critical market watchpoint
TD3C: 52-Week High 142 | TD15 : 52-Week High 124
Image reference: unnamed.png | assets/2025-11-28_vlcc-freight-pulse-amp-russia-flows_img_unnamed_8d69ac4a063a.png
This week's analysis focuses on VLCC performance and the evolving Russian crude flows. Building on our October and November Special Editions, we have already outlined the main drivers behind the recent market surge. In the November edition, we emphasised how structural inefficiencies are increasingly shaping market behaviour, reflected in elevated tonne-days despite relatively softer tonne-mile growth.
